accurate.why: All claims are accurate and supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as imposing sanctions on CCP Central Committee members for specified conduct.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes visa and property-blocking sanctions and termination conditions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Omits the material exceptions for the UN HQ Agreement, intelligence/law enforcement activities, and goods importation, as well as the fentanyl-enterprise sanction category.

effective_dates.why: Does not mention the 30-day implementation deadline, 60-day waiver periods, or 2-year expiration of waiver authority.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits the fentanyl state-owned enterprise sanction category, the election interference sanctionable conduct, the Tibet cessation condition for termination, and the exceptions.

concise.why: Appropriately brief given its high-level scope.

correct_figures.why: States waiver is for 'renewable periods of up to 60 days' (correct) but omits the 15-day advance notice requirement; not a figure error but the summary is incomplete on key numeric details.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
